ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the investment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "deal_captain" TEXT /* Name of the deal captain responsible for the investment */,
  "quantity_bought" INTEGER /* Total quantity of shares bought */,
  "net_money" REAL /* Total net money spent on the investment */,
  "average_bought_price" REAL /* Average price per share when bought */,
  "last_close_price" REAL /* Last closing price of the stock */,
  "eod_quantity" INTEGER /* End of day quantity held */,
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment type */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment related to this transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction took place */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the shares involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for that day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for that day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded that day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for that day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment for which the dividend is issued */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend paid per share */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Payment date for the dividend */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being evaluated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded metrics */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage for the investment on that date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the investment based on historical prices */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_overview" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the portfolio overview record */,
  "total_invested" REAL /* Total amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total current value of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio overview record */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio on that date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio based on historical prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., equity, fixed income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being assessed for risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment that triggered the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, dividend announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment related to the recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "action" TEXT /* Recommended action (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio component */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the investment in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_components_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio_overview ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_components_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_exposures" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor exposure */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor name (e.g., size, value, momentum) */,
  "exposure" REAL /* Exposure to the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_exposures_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor return */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor name (e.g., size, value, momentum) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the factor return */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the factor on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id")
)
